title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.848 - Distribution of state school aid for charter schools — powers and duties of governing body of charter schools — performance report
text:
160.415.  Distribution of state school aid for charter schools — powers and duties of governing body of charter schools — performance report. — Any interested party may bring an action to determine the existence or nonexistence of a mother and child relationship.  Insofar as possible, the provisions of sections 210.817 to 210.852 applicable to the father and child relationship apply to the mother and child relationship.
(L. 1987 S.B. 328 § 20) 
Effective 7-15-87
